data.title: Shoulder injury patterns in Brazilian jiu-jitsu: a 5-year retrospective

data.abstract: We retrospectively analyzed 412 shoulder injuries from competitive BJJ athletes. Submission-related injuries account for 38% of cases, with the kimura position the leading vector.
data.title: Shoulder injury patterns in Brazilian jiu-jitsu: a 5-year retrospective

title: Shoulder injury patterns in Brazilian jiu-jitsu: a 5-year retrospective
